content.text:
`DSC CHINA NX4` 프로젝트 구조입니다:

- **NX4C FRT/** — 전면 조립 라인
  - `NX4C FRT ASSEMBLE.sln` 솔루션
  - JA01~JA04 스테이션, FTECH_SETUP, SERVER SEARCH
- **NX4C REAR/** — 후면 조립 라인
  - `NX4CREAR.sln` 솔루션 + `NX4C FRT ASSEMBLE.sln`
  - JA01~JA04 (LH/RH), END TEST, KU VIP 2ND BACK 등 다수 스테이션
  - `RRBACK DB.mdb` Access DB, `조립 아이오.xlsx` IO 맵

어떤 작업을 하시겠습니까? (예: 프로젝트 분석, 빌드, 특정 스테이션 코드 수정 등)

---

## 분석 결과 요약

저장 위치: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\.project-analysis.md`

### 솔루션 구성 (7개 VB 프로젝트)

| 프로젝트 | 스테이션 | 역할 |
|---|---|---|
| RH_JA01(201) | 201 | RH 토크 체결 1 (공구 x1, 바코드 스캔, 라벨 출력) |
| RH_JA02(202) | 202 | RH 토크 체결 2 (공구 x2) |
| RH_JA03(203) | 203 | RH 토크 체결 3 (공구 x2 + 레이저) |
| LH_JA01(211) | 211 | LH 대칭 구조 |
| LH_JA02(212) | 212 | LH 대칭 구조 |
| END(210) | 210 | 최종 검사 — 로드셀 x4 (STG1/STG2 × L/R) |
| SERVEr Search | — | SQL Server 데이터 조회 도구 |

### 통신 프로토콜

- **I/O 모듈** (115200bps): `S` + 32-bit DI string + `E` (34바이트), DO는 `S00000000E` 형식
- **토크 공구** (9600bps): 132바이트 바이너리 프레임, bytes[27:28] hex → /1000 = Nm
- **바코드 스캐너** (9600bps): ReadLine, 14자(JA01) 또는 26자(JA02+)
- **ZPL 프린터** (9600bps): `^XA`...`^XZ` DataMatrix 라벨
- **로드셀 4채널** (14400bps): `Mid(data,10,8)` 파싱, 리셋 명령 `0x01 0x5A 0x0D 0x0A`
- **SQL Server**: `192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR`, DB=NX4C, sa/sns123., (하드코딩)

### 상태 머신

- JA 스테이션: 0(대기) → 1(스캔) → 2~3(파트 로드) → 4(체결 대기) → 4.1(완료) → 5(확인) → 6~7(리셋)
- END TEST: 0→1(시리얼 대기)→2(리셋)→3(스테이지 선택)→4~6(STG1 측정/판정)→8~10(STG2)→11(DB/출력)→12(완료)

### FlexCell 사용

- 버전 4.3.7.0, 모든 프로젝트에서 I/O 모니터 그리드 및 데이터 그리드로 사용
- END TEST는 추가로 `AxCWUIControlsLib.AxCWButton` (ACTOOL Ether COM 컴포넌트) 사용</result>

content.text: REAR 분석 완료. FRT 분석 대기 중... 먼저 REAR 분석 결과를 자세히 확인하겠습니다.

content.content:
1→# NX4C REAR Project Analysis
     2→
     3→**Solution:** `NX4CREAR.sln`
     4→**Platform:** VB.NET .NET Framework 4.0, WinForms
     5→**Location:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\`
     6→**Analysis Date:** 2026-03-13
     7→
     8→---
     9→
    10→## 1. Solution Projects
    11→
    12→| Project Name | Folder | vbproj | Station No. | Role |
    13→|---|---|---|---|---|
    14→| RH_JA01(201) | `RH_JA01\` | `RH_JA01(201).vbproj` | 201 | RH side JA01 — torque tool x1, barcode scan, label print |
    15→| RH_JA02(202) | `RH_JA02\` | `RH_JA02(202).vbproj` | 202 | RH side JA02 — torque tool x2 |
    16→| RH_JA03(203) | `RH_JA03\` | `RH_JA03(203).vbproj` | 203 | RH side JA03 — torque tool x2 + laser measurement |
    17→| LH_JA01(211) | `LH_JA01\` | `LH_JA01(211).vbproj` | 211 | LH side JA01 — same structure as RH_JA01 |
    18→| LH_JA02(212) | `LH_JA02\` | `LH_JA02(212).vbproj` | 212 | LH side JA02 — same structure as RH_JA02 |
    19→| END(210) | `END TEST\` | `END(210).vbproj` | 210 | End-of-line test — load cell x4 (L/R x STG1/STG2), final barcode print |
    20→| SERVEr Search | `SERVER SEARCH\` | `SERVEr Search.vbproj` | — | SQL Server data search tool (standalone viewer) |
    21→| FtechNiSetup | `FtechNiSetup\` | `FtechNiSetup.vdproj` | — | Installer project |
    22→| Ftech_Setup | `Ftech_Setup\` | `Ftech_Setup.vdproj` | — | Installer project |
    23→
    24→> **Note:** `JA02/`, `JA03/`, `JA04/` folders exist under the REAR root but reference separate `.vbproj` files (`FRT JA02.vbproj`, `FRT JA03.vbproj`, `FRT JA04.vbproj`) not included in `NX4CREAR.sln` — these are FRONT station projects stored in the same directory for convenience.
    25→
    26→---
    27→
    28→## 2. File Structure (per project)
    29→
    30→All JA01~JA03, LH_JA01~LH_JA02 projects follow an identical structure:
    31→
    32→| File | Role |
    33→|---|---|
    34→| `FrmMain.vb` | Main form — state machine, serial I/O, DO control, DB save |
    35→| `Module1.vb` | Global variables — port names, spec limits, Load/Save MDB/SQL |
    36→| `Common/MDBOperation.vb` | DB connection helpers — MDB (local) and SQL Server (remote) |
    37→| `FrmPort.vb` | Serial port configuration UI |
    38→| `FrmPart.vb` | Part number master management UI |
    39→| `FrmSearch.vb` | Local result search UI |
    40→| `FrmWorkStandardSet.vb` | Work standard image file management (FlexCell grid) |
    41→| `FrmImage.vb` | Work instruction image display |
    42→| `FrmBarcode.vb` | Barcode label print position settings (RH_JA01 only) |
    43→| `FrmBasic.vb` | Spec (min/max) setting form (END TEST only) |
    44→| `FormPassword.vb` | Password input dialog |
    45→| `AssemblyInfo.vb` | Assembly metadata |
    46→
    47→**END TEST** additional files:
    48→
    49→| File | Role |
    50→|---|---|
    51→| `FrmBarcode.vb` | End barcode format settings (6 field positions) |
    52→| `FrmBasic.vb` | Load cell spec settings (Load1/Load2 L/R min/max/tol) |
    53→
    54→**SERVER SEARCH** (standalone):
    55→
    56→| File | Role |
    57→|---|---|
    58→| `FrmMain.vb` | SQL Server query UI — date range + serial filter, FlexCell grid display, Excel export |
    59→| `Module1.vb` | (none — all inline) |
    60→
    61→---
    62→
    63→## 3. Communication Protocols
    64→
    65→### 3-1. Serial Module (I/O Module — all JA stations)
    66→
    67→| Item | Value |
    68→|---|---|
    69→| Port | Configurable (stored in DB as `MODULE`) |
    70→| Baudrate | 115200 |
    71→| DataBits | 8 |
    72→| Direction | Bidirectional |
    73→| TX format | `S` + 8-char DO bit string + `E` (10 bytes total, e.g. `S00000000E`) |
    74→| RX format | `S` + 32-char DI bit string + `E` (34 bytes total) |
    75→| Parse rule | Frame starts with `"S"`, ends with `"E"`, length == 34; bits 0–15 mapped to `D_Value(0..15)` |
    76→| Poll method | Dedicated background thread (`ThreadTask2`) — blocking `ReadLine()` loop |
    77→
    78→### 3-2. Serial Scanner (Barcode Reader)
    79→
    80→| Item | Value |
    81→|---|---|
    82→| Port | Configurable (`SCANNER`) |
    83→| Baudrate | 9600 |
    84→| DataBits | 8 |
    85→| Event | `DataReceived` event handler |
    86→| Parse rule | `ReadLine()`, strip trailing char (`Mid$(data,1,Len-1)`) |
    87→| Trigger | `wStep = 1` — valid scan length 14 chars (JA01) or 26 chars (JA02) |
    88→| JA01 behavior | 14-char scan = PartNo → `LoadPArt()` |
    89→| JA02 behavior | 26-char scan = full LineSerial; right 14 chars = PartNo |
    90→
    91→### 3-3. Serial Torque Tool (Atlas Copco / similar)
    92→
    93→| Item | Value |
    94→|---|---|
    95→| Port | Configurable (`TOOL1`, `TOOL2` for JA02/JA03) |
    96→| Baudrate | 9600 |
    97→| DataBits | 8 |
    98→| Protocol | Binary frame, 132 bytes per result |
    99→| Parse rule | Read byte-by-byte (`ReadByte`), accumulate 132 bytes; extract bytes 27–28 as hex, convert to decimal; divide by 1000 (TOOL1) or 100 (TOOL2) for Nm value |
   100→| Status byte | `sRecvData(5) = "01"` indicates valid tightening result |
   101→| Active step | Only processed when `wStep = 4` |
   102→| Poll method | Dedicated background thread (`ThreadTask1`, `ThreadTask3`) — `DoEvents()` loop |
   103→
   104→### 3-4. Serial Printer (Zebra ZPL label printer)
   105→
   106→| Item | Value |
   107→|---|---|
   108→| Port | Configurable (`PRINTER`) |
   109→| Baudrate | 9600 |
   110→| DataBits | 8 |
   111→| Protocol | ZPL (Zebra Programming Language) text commands |
   112→| Command structure | `^XA` ... `^XZ` frame; `^BXN` = DataMatrix barcode; `^A0N` = font/text fields |
   113→| Fields printed | PartNo, SerialNumber, PartName |
   114→
   115→### 3-5. Serial Load Cell (END TEST station only)
   116→
   117→| Item | Value |
   118→|---|---|
   119→| Ports | `Load1L`, `Load1R`, `Load2L`, `Load2R` (4 separate ports) |
   120→| Baudrate | 14400 |
   121→| DataBits | 8 |
   122→| Event | `DataReceived` per port |
   123→| Parse rule | `ReadLine()`, strip trailing char; extract chars 10–17 (8 chars) as numeric weight value (format: `ST,GS,    0.00 kg`) |
   124→| Reset command | Sent `0x01 0x5A 0x0D 0x0A` to tare/zero load cell |
   125→| Active step | Only logged to array when `wStep = 5` (STG1) or `wStep = 9` (STG2) |
   126→
   127→### 3-6. SQL Server (Remote DB)
   128→
   129→| Item | Value |
   130→|---|---|
   131→| Host | `192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR` |
   132→| Database | `NX4C` |
   133→| User ID | `sa` |
   134→| Password | `sns123.,` (hardcoded) |
   135→| Provider | `SQLOLEDB` via `ADODB.Connection` |
   136→| Usage | Read `TablePart` (part master), INSERT/UPDATE `TableMainRH` / `TableMainLH` |
   137→
   138→### 3-7. Access MDB (Local Config DB)
   139→
   140→| Item | Value |
   141→|---|---|
   142→| Path | `.\DB\DB.mdb` (each project's own) |
   143→| Common DB | `..\..\Common\CommonDB.mdb` (shared across stations) |
   144→| Provider | `Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0` via `ADODB.Connection` |
   145→| Usage | Load/Save port config, spec limits, barcode positions, image file list |
   146→
   147→---
   148→
   149→## 4. I/O (Digital) Address Map
   150→
   151→### 4-1. DI — Input signals (D_Value index)
   152→
   153→| Index | Signal | Description |
   154→|---|---|---|
   155→| 0 | DI_00 | Start trigger — part load detected |
   156→| 1 | DI_01 | Reset trigger — part removed / emergency reset |
   157→| 2 | DI_02 | OK confirmation — conveyor advance signal |
   158→| 3 | DI_03 | STG1 start trigger (END TEST) / re-load previous part (JA01) |
   159→| 4 | DI_04 | STG2 start trigger (END TEST) |
   160→
   161→### 4-2. DO — Output signals (D_OutString bit index)
   162→
   163→| Index | Signal | Description |
   164→|---|---|---|
   165→| 0 | DO_00 | Position indicator LH |
   166→| 1 | DO_01 | Position indicator RH |
   167→| 2 | DO_02 | (reserved) |
   168→| 3 | DO_03 | Remote option output |
   169→| 4 | DO_04 | Part loaded / ready signal |
   170→| 5 | DO_05 | Tightening OK signal |
   171→| 6 | DO_06 | Final OK / complete signal |
   172→| 7 | DO_07 | (reserved) |
   173→
   174→**Protocol:** String format `S{b0}{b1}...{b7}00000000E` — bits are ASCII '0' or '1', fixed 10 chars, written via `Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)`
   175→
   176→---
   177→
   178→## 5. State Machine (wStep)
   179→
   180→### 5-1. JA01 / JA02 / JA03 / LH_JA01 / LH_JA02 (Torque tightening stations)
   181→
   182→| Step | Name | Action | Transition Condition |
   183→|---|---|---|---|
   184→| 0 | IDLE | Wait for part | `D_Value(0) = 1` → step 1 |
   185→| 1 | SCAN_WAIT | Prompt barcode scan | Scanner `DataReceived` event → loads part data → step 2 |
   186→| 2 | SCAN_DONE | Part identified | Auto → step 3 |
   187→| 3 | SERIAL_GEN | Generate LineSerial number | Auto → step 4 |
   188→| 4 | TIGHTEN_WAIT | Wait for torque result | `ThreadTask1/3` receives 132-byte frame → evaluates OK/NG → stays at 4 until both tools OK |
   189→| 4.1 | TIGHTEN_COMPLETE | Both torque OK | Print barcode + SaveDB → step 5 |
   190→| 5 | CONFIRM_WAIT | Wait for output confirm | `D_Value(2) = 1` → step 6 |
   191→| 6 | DONE | Show complete | Init + show image → step 7 |
   192→| 7 | RESET_DO | Clear all DOs | All DO OFF → step 0 |
   193→| rStep=1 | RESET_TRIG | Reset trigger detected | `D_Value(1)=1 AND wStep≠0` → clear DOs → rStep=2 |
   194→| rStep=2 | RESET_DONE | InitControl | → wStep=0, rStep=0 |
   195→
   196→### 5-2. END TEST (210) — Load cell end-of-line test
   197→
   198→| Step | Name | Action | Transition Condition |
   199→|---|---|---|---|
   200→| 0 | IDLE | Wait for ready | `D_Value(0) = 1` → step 1 |
   201→| 1 | SERIAL_WAIT | Wait both LH+RH serial scanned | Both `srcLbSerialL` and `srcLbSerialR` non-empty → step 2 |
   202→| 2 | RESET_LOADCELL | Send tare command to all 4 load cells | Auto → step 2.1 |
   203→| 2.1 | WAIT_RESET | Brief wait after reset | Auto → step 3 |
   204→| 3 | STG_SELECT | Detect which stage to start | `D_Value(3)=1` → step 4 (STG1) / `D_Value(4)=1` → step 8 (STG2) |
   205→| 4 | STG1_INIT | Initialize timers, arrays for STG1 | Auto → step 5 |
   206→| 5 | STG1_MEASURE | Sample Load1L/R into arrays, plot graph | `D_Value(3) = 0` → step 6 |
   207→| 6 | STG1_CALC | Calculate max/avg, judge OK/NG, DO_ON(4) | Auto → step 11 |
   208→| 7 | STG2_TRIGGER | Wait for STG2 start | `D_Value(4)=1` → step 8 |
   209→| 8 | STG2_INIT | Initialize timers, arrays for STG2 | Auto → step 9 |
   210→| 9 | STG2_MEASURE | Sample Load2L/R into arrays, plot graph | `D_Value(4) = 0` → step 10 |
   211→| 10 | STG2_CALC | Calculate max/avg, judge OK/NG, DO_ON(5) | Auto → step 11 |
   212→| 11 | DB_PRINT | UpdateDB + BarcodePrint if OK | Auto → step 11.1 |
   213→| 11.1 | BARCODE_VERIFY | Wait for final barcode scan verification | `srcBarCheckLH="OK" AND srcBarCheckRH="OK"` → DO_ON(6) → step 12 |
   214→| 12 | COMPLETE_WAIT | Wait for unload signal | `D_Value(2) = 1` → clear all DOs → step 100 |
   215→| 100 | FINISH | Clear, show result | Auto → step 0 |
   216→| rStep=1 | EMERGENCY_RESET | `D_Value(1)=1` at any step | Clear all DOs, InitControl → wStep=100 |
   217→
   218→---
   219→
   220→## 6. Data Flow
   221→
   222→```
   223→[Barcode Scanner Serial]
   224→  --> ReadLine() in DataReceived
   225→  --> ScanData = Mid(Incoming, 1, Len-1)
   226→  --> Validate length (14 or 26 chars)
   227→  --> LoadPArt(partNo) → SQL Server TablePart
   228→  --> Set OptionPosition (LH/RH), OptionRemote
   229→  --> DO_ON/OFF(0,1,3) for position/remote indicators
   230→
   231→[Torque Tool Serial (binary)]
   232→  --> ReadByte() in background thread
   233→  --> Accumulate 132 bytes
   234→  --> bytes[27:28] hex → Dec2Hex/Hex2Dec → / 1000 (or /100) = Nm value
   235→  --> bytes[5] = "01" = valid tightening complete
   236→  --> Compare vs Basic_TQ_MIN ~ Basic_TQ_MAX
   237→  --> Display OK (Blue) / NG (Red), play sound
   238→
   239→[Module I/O Serial]
   240→  --> ReadLine() in background thread
   241→  --> Frame: "S" + 32 bits + "E" (34 chars)
   242→  --> Parse bits 0..15 → D_Value array
   243→  --> Timer1 (100ms) → update IN_LABEL colors
   244→  --> wStep state machine in Tmr_Work1 (100ms) reads D_Value
   245→
   246→[Load Cell Serial x4 (END TEST)]
   247→  --> ReadLine() in DataReceived
   248→  --> Strip trailing char
   249→  --> Mid(data, 10, 8) = weight value string → CDbl()
   250→  --> Stored in ValueLoad1L/R, ValueLoad2L/R
   251→  --> wStep 5/9: append to array + graph (HiResTimer timestamp)
   252→  --> wStep 6/10: calculate AVR/MAX, compare spec, judge OK/NG
   253→
   254→[SQL Server INSERT/UPDATE]
   255→  --> JA01: INSERT INTO TABLEMAINRH (JA01_DATE, JA01_START_TIME, JA01_END_TIME, LINESERIAL, PARTNO, JA01_TQ1, JA01_TQ2, JA01_DECISION)
   256→  --> JA02: UPDATE TableMainRH SET JA02_DATE, JA02_TQ1, JA02_TQ2, JA02_DECISION WHERE LineSerial
   257→  --> END(JA04): UPDATE TableMainLH/RH SET JA04_STG1_Max, JA04_STG1_AVR, JA04_STG1_DECISION, JA04_STG2_Max, JA04_STG2_AVR, JA04_STG2_DECISION
   258→
   259→[ZPL Printer Serial]
   260→  --> Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
   261→  --> ^BXN DataMatrix barcode field (SerialNumber)
   262→  --> ^A0N text fields (PartNo, SerialNumber, PartName)
   263→  --> Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")
   264→```
   265→
   266→---
   267→
   268→## 7. DB Tables
   269→
   270→### 7-1. Local MDB (DB.mdb — per project)
   271→
   272→| Table | Columns | Purpose |
   273→|---|---|---|
   274→| `Table_SerialPort` | MODULE, SCANNER, PRINTER, TOOL1, TOOL2, LASER1, LASER2, PASSWORD | Serial port assignments and password |
   275→| `Table_BASIC` | TOOL1_MIN, TOOL1_MAX, TOOL1_UNIT, TOOL2_MIN, TOOL2_MAX, TOOL2_UNIT | Torque spec limits (JA01~JA03) |
   276→| `Table_BASIC` (END) | Unit, Load1MinL, Load1MaxL, Load1TolL, Load2MinL, Load2MaxL, Load2TolL, Load1MinR, Load1MaxR, Load1TolR, Load2MinR, Load2MaxR, Load2TolR, IgnoreStart, IgnoreEnd, MeasureTypeL, MeasureTypeR | Load cell spec limits and measurement type |
   277→| `Table_Image` | ID, StandardFile | Work instruction image file paths |
   278→| `Table_Barcode` | B1X, B1Y, B1L, B2X..B6W, B6H | Barcode label print position settings |
   279→| `Table_Etc` | LINE_POSITION (unused) | Miscellaneous settings |
   280→
   281→### 7-2. SQL Server (NX4C database)
   282→
   283→| Table | Key Columns | Purpose |
   284→|---|---|---|
   285→| `TablePart` | PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote | Part master — LH/RH designation, Remote option |
   286→| `TableMainRH` | JA01_DATE, JA01_START_TIME, JA01_END_TIME, LINESERIAL, PARTNO, JA01_TQ1, JA01_TQ2, JA01_DECISION, JA02_DATE, JA02_TQ1, JA02_TQ2, JA02_DECISION, JA03_*, JA04_STG1_Max, JA04_STG1_AVR, JA04_STG1_DECISION, JA04_STG2_* | RH side process results — one row per unit, updated station by station |
   287→| `TableMainLH` | Same column pattern as TableMainRH | LH side process results |
   288→
   289→---
   290→
   291→## 8. FlexCell References
   292→
   293→| Project | Reference | Version | Usage |
   294→|---|---|---|---|
   295→| All JA stations | `FlexCell.dll` | 4.3.7.0 | `FlexCell.Grid` in FrmMain (I/O monitor grid), FrmWorkStandardSet (image list grid) |
   296→| SERVER SEARCH | `FlexCell.dll` (via `Grid1`) | 4.3.7.0 | Main data search result grid (`SetDataBinding`, `ExportToExcel`) |
   297→| DLL Path | `C:\Program Files (x86)\FlexCell Technologies\FlexCell.NET4\bin\FlexCell.dll` | — | Installed component |
   298→
   299→**FlexCell usage patterns:**
   300→
   301→- `Init_Grid(GridName As FlexCell.Grid)` — initialize with 4 columns (No., I/O, Dec.) for I/O monitor display
   302→- `SetDataBinding(dataset, tableName)` — SERVER SEARCH result binding
   303→- `Grid1.ExportToExcel(path, True)` — export to .xls
   304→- `FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter`, `ResizeEnum.Columns`, `SelectionModeEnum.ByCell`
   305→
   306→---
   307→
   308→## 9. Additional COM References
   309→
   310→| Component | Usage | Project |
   311→|---|---|---|
   312→| `ACTETHERLib` / `AxACTETHERLib` | Ethernet I/O controller (ACTOOL Ether) — IN_LABEL/OUT_LABEL typed as `AxCWUIControlsLib.AxCWButton` | END TEST (210) |
   313→| `AxCWUIControlsLib` | CW UI button controls for I/O display | END TEST (210) |
   314→| `ADODB` (7.0.3300.0) | ADO recordset for MDB and SQL Server access | All projects |
   315→
   316→> **Note:** JA01~JA03, LH_JA01~LH_JA02 use standard `Label` controls for I/O display. END TEST uses `AxCWButton` controls from the ACTOOL Ether COM component, indicating a different hardware I/O module for that station.
   317→
   318→---
   319→
   320→## 10. Hardcoded Constants
   321→
   322→| Name / Location | Value | Purpose |
   323→|---|---|---|
   324→| SQL Server connection string (all `MDBOperation.vb`) | `Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,` | Central SQL Server access |
   325→| Common MDB path (`MDBOperation.vb`) | `..\..\ Common\CommonDB.mdb` | Shared config database path |
   326→| Module serial baudrate | `115200` | I/O module serial port speed |
   327→| Scanner/Printer/Tool baudrate | `9600` | Peripheral device serial port speed |
   328→| Load cell baudrate (END TEST) | `14400` | Load cell serial port speed |
   329→| Tool frame length | `132` | Bytes per torque tool result packet |
   330→| Tool value offset | bytes[27:28] / 1000 (TOOL1), / 100 (TOOL2) | Torque value extraction and scaling |
   331→| Load cell data offset | `Mid(data, 10, 8)` | Extract 8-char numeric field from load cell string |
   332→| Load cell reset command | `0x01 0x5A 0x0D 0x0A` | Tare/zero command |
   333→| IO frame SOF/EOF | `"S"` / `"E"` | Module I/O frame delimiters |
   334→| IO frame length | `34` | Expected receive frame length |
   335→| DO string initial value | `"S" & "00000000" & "E"` | All outputs off initial state |
   336→| Scanner valid length JA01 | `14` | Expected barcode scan length for part number |
   337→| Scanner valid length JA02+ | `26` | Full line serial scan length |
   338→| Timer interval | `100` ms | I/O poll timer and work state timer interval |
   339→| Torque tool valid status byte | `"01"` at index 5 | Indicates completed valid tightening |
   340→| Array max size (END TEST) | `100000` | Maximum load cell sample buffer size |
   341→| osk path | `C:\Windows\System32\osk.exe` | On-screen keyboard launcher |
   342→
   343→---
   344→
   345→## 11. Shared Code Between Projects
   346→
   347→| Shared Element | Projects | Notes |
   348→|---|---|---|
   349→| `Common/MDBOperation.vb` | All JA stations | Identical file copied per project (not a shared project reference) |
   350→| `FrmMain.vb` structure | RH_JA01, RH_JA02, LH_JA01, LH_JA02 | Near-identical — JA02 adds 2nd tool thread, JA02 uses 26-char serial input |
   351→| `Module1.vb` globals pattern | All JA stations | Same structure, JA03 adds TOOL2 spec fields, END TEST has load cell fields |
   352→| `Init_Grid()` method | All JA stations | Identical FlexCell grid initialization |
   353→| `Control2Arry()` method | All JA stations | Identical IN_LABEL/OUT_LABEL array mapping |
   354→| `DO_ON/DO_OFF/DO_WRITE()` | All JA stations | Identical bit-string manipulation for module output |
   355→| `ThreadTask2()` I/O module reader | All JA stations | Identical 34-byte frame parser |
   356→| `BarcodePrint()` ZPL method | JA01, JA02, END TEST | Same ZPL template structure |
   357→| SQL Server connection string | All projects | Hardcoded identically in every `MDBOperation.vb` |
   358→| `wStep` flow skeleton (0→1→2→3→4→4.1→5→6→7) | JA01~JA03, LH_JA01~LH_JA02 | Same sequence, END TEST has extended steps 8~12 |
   359→

# NX4C REAR Project Analysis

**Solution:** `NX4CREAR.sln`
**Platform:** VB.NET .NET Framework 4.0, WinForms
**Location:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\`
**Analysis Date:** 2026-03-13

---

## 1. Solution Projects

| Project Name | Folder | vbproj | Station No. | Role |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| RH_JA01(201) | `RH_JA01\` | `RH_JA01(201).vbproj` | 201 | RH side JA01 — torque tool x1, barcode scan, label print |
| RH_JA02(202) | `RH_JA02\` | `RH_JA02(202).vbproj` | 202 | RH side JA02 — torque tool x2 |
| RH_JA03(203) | `RH_JA03\` | `RH_JA03(203).vbproj` | 203 | RH side JA03 — torque tool x2 + laser measurement |
| LH_JA01(211) | `LH_JA01\` | `LH_JA01(211).vbproj` | 211 | LH side JA01 — same structure as RH_JA01 |
| LH_JA02(212) | `LH_JA02\` | `LH_JA02(212).vbproj` | 212 | LH side JA02 — same structure as RH_JA02 |
| END(210) | `END TEST\` | `END(210).vbproj` | 210 | End-of-line test — load cell x4 (L/R x STG1/STG2), final barcode print |
| SERVEr Search | `SERVER SEARCH\` | `SERVEr Search.vbproj` | — | SQL Server data search tool (standalone viewer) |
| FtechNiSetup | `FtechNiSetup\` | `FtechNiSetup.vdproj` | — | Installer project |
| Ftech_Setup | `Ftech_Setup\` | `Ftech_Setup.vdproj` | — | Installer project |

> **Note:** `JA02/`, `JA03/`, `JA04/` folders exist under the REAR root but reference separate `.vbproj` files (`FRT JA02.vbproj`, `FRT JA03.vbproj`, `FRT JA04.vbproj`) not included in `NX4CREAR.sln` — these are FRONT station projects stored in the same directory for convenience.

---

## 2. File Structure (per project)

All JA01~JA03, LH_JA01~LH_JA02 projects follow an identical structure:

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `FrmMain.vb` | Main form — state machine, serial I/O, DO control, DB save |
| `Module1.vb` | Global variables — port names, spec limits, Load/Save MDB/SQL |
| `Common/MDBOperation.vb` | DB connection helpers — MDB (local) and SQL Server (remote) |
| `FrmPort.vb` | Serial port configuration UI |
| `FrmPart.vb` | Part number master management UI |
| `FrmSearch.vb` | Local result search UI |
| `FrmWorkStandardSet.vb` | Work standard image file management (FlexCell grid) |
| `FrmImage.vb` | Work instruction image display |
| `FrmBarcode.vb` | Barcode label print position settings (RH_JA01 only) |
| `FrmBasic.vb` | Spec (min/max) setting form (END TEST only) |
| `FormPassword.vb` | Password input dialog |
| `AssemblyInfo.vb` | Assembly metadata |

**END TEST** additional files:

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `FrmBarcode.vb` | End barcode format settings (6 field positions) |
| `FrmBasic.vb` | Load cell spec settings (Load1/Load2 L/R min/max/tol) |

**SERVER SEARCH** (standalone):

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `FrmMain.vb` | SQL Server query UI — date range + serial filter, FlexCell grid display, Excel export |
| `Module1.vb` | (none — all inline) |

---

## 3. Communication Protocols

### 3-1. Serial Module (I/O Module — all JA stations)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Port | Configurable (stored in DB as `MODULE`) |
| Baudrate | 115200 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Direction | Bidirectional |
| TX format | `S` + 8-char DO bit string + `E` (10 bytes total, e.g. `S00000000E`) |
| RX format | `S` + 32-char DI bit string + `E` (34 bytes total) |
| Parse rule | Frame starts with `"S"`, ends with `"E"`, length == 34; bits 0–15 mapped to `D_Value(0..15)` |
| Poll method | Dedicated background thread (`ThreadTask2`) — blocking `ReadLine()` loop |

### 3-2. Serial Scanner (Barcode Reader)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Port | Configurable (`SCANNER`) |
| Baudrate | 9600 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Event | `DataReceived` event handler |
| Parse rule | `ReadLine()`, strip trailing char (`Mid$(data,1,Len-1)`) |
| Trigger | `wStep = 1` — valid scan length 14 chars (JA01) or 26 chars (JA02) |
| JA01 behavior | 14-char scan = PartNo → `LoadPArt()` |
| JA02 behavior | 26-char scan = full LineSerial; right 14 chars = PartNo |

### 3-3. Serial Torque Tool (Atlas Copco / similar)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Port | Configurable (`TOOL1`, `TOOL2` for JA02/JA03) |
| Baudrate | 9600 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Protocol | Binary frame, 132 bytes per result |
| Parse rule | Read byte-by-byte (`ReadByte`), accumulate 132 bytes; extract bytes 27–28 as hex, convert to decimal; divide by 1000 (TOOL1) or 100 (TOOL2) for Nm value |
| Status byte | `sRecvData(5) = "01"` indicates valid tightening result |
| Active step | Only processed when `wStep = 4` |
| Poll method | Dedicated background thread (`ThreadTask1`, `ThreadTask3`) — `DoEvents()` loop |

### 3-4. Serial Printer (Zebra ZPL label printer)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Port | Configurable (`PRINTER`) |
| Baudrate | 9600 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Protocol | ZPL (Zebra Programming Language) text commands |
| Command structure | `^XA` ... `^XZ` frame; `^BXN` = DataMatrix barcode; `^A0N` = font/text fields |
| Fields printed | PartNo, SerialNumber, PartName |

### 3-5. Serial Load Cell (END TEST station only)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Ports | `Load1L`, `Load1R`, `Load2L`, `Load2R` (4 separate ports) |
| Baudrate | 14400 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Event | `DataReceived` per port |
| Parse rule | `ReadLine()`, strip trailing char; extract chars 10–17 (8 chars) as numeric weight value (format: `ST,GS,    0.00 kg`) |
| Reset command | Sent `0x01 0x5A 0x0D 0x0A` to tare/zero load cell |
| Active step | Only logged to array when `wStep = 5` (STG1) or `wStep = 9` (STG2) |

### 3-6. SQL Server (Remote DB)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Host | `192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR` |
| Database | `NX4C` |
| User ID | `sa` |
| Password | `sns123.,` (hardcoded) |
| Provider | `SQLOLEDB` via `ADODB.Connection` |
| Usage | Read `TablePart` (part master), INSERT/UPDATE `TableMainRH` / `TableMainLH` |

### 3-7. Access MDB (Local Config DB)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Path | `.\DB\DB.mdb` (each project's own) |
| Common DB | `..\..\Common\CommonDB.mdb` (shared across stations) |
| Provider | `Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0` via `ADODB.Connection` |
| Usage | Load/Save port config, spec limits, barcode positions, image file list |

---

## 4. I/O (Digital) Address Map

### 4-1. DI — Input signals (D_Value index)

| Index | Signal | Description |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | DI_00 | Start trigger — part load detected |
| 1 | DI_01 | Reset trigger — part removed / emergency reset |
| 2 | DI_02 | OK confirmation — conveyor advance signal |
| 3 | DI_03 | STG1 start trigger (END TEST) / re-load previous part (JA01) |
| 4 | DI_04 | STG2 start trigger (END TEST) |

### 4-2. DO — Output signals (D_OutString bit index)

| Index | Signal | Description |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | DO_00 | Position indicator LH |
| 1 | DO_01 | Position indicator RH |
| 2 | DO_02 | (reserved) |
| 3 | DO_03 | Remote option output |
| 4 | DO_04 | Part loaded / ready signal |
| 5 | DO_05 | Tightening OK signal |
| 6 | DO_06 | Final OK / complete signal |
| 7 | DO_07 | (reserved) |

**Protocol:** String format `S{b0}{b1}...{b7}00000000E` — bits are ASCII '0' or '1', fixed 10 chars, written via `Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)`

---

## 5. State Machine (wStep)

### 5-1. JA01 / JA02 / JA03 / LH_JA01 / LH_JA02 (Torque tightening stations)

| Step | Name | Action | Transition Condition |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | IDLE | Wait for part | `D_Value(0) = 1` → step 1 |
| 1 | SCAN_WAIT | Prompt barcode scan | Scanner `DataReceived` event → loads part data → step 2 |
| 2 | SCAN_DONE | Part identified | Auto → step 3 |
| 3 | SERIAL_GEN | Generate LineSerial number | Auto → step 4 |
| 4 | TIGHTEN_WAIT | Wait for torque result | `ThreadTask1/3` receives 132-byte frame → evaluates OK/NG → stays at 4 until both tools OK |
| 4.1 | TIGHTEN_COMPLETE | Both torque OK | Print barcode + SaveDB → step 5 |
| 5 | CONFIRM_WAIT | Wait for output confirm | `D_Value(2) = 1` → step 6 |
| 6 | DONE | Show complete | Init + show image → step 7 |
| 7 | RESET_DO | Clear all DOs | All DO OFF → step 0 |
| rStep=1 | RESET_TRIG | Reset trigger detected | `D_Value(1)=1 AND wStep≠0` → clear DOs → rStep=2 |
| rStep=2 | RESET_DONE | InitControl | → wStep=0, rStep=0 |

### 5-2. END TEST (210) — Load cell end-of-line test

| Step | Name | Action | Transition Condition |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | IDLE | Wait for ready | `D_Value(0) = 1` → step 1 |
| 1 | SERIAL_WAIT | Wait both LH+RH serial scanned | Both `srcLbSerialL` and `srcLbSerialR` non-empty → step 2 |
| 2 | RESET_LOADCELL | Send tare command to all 4 load cells | Auto → step 2.1 |
| 2.1 | WAIT_RESET | Brief wait after reset | Auto → step 3 |
| 3 | STG_SELECT | Detect which stage to start | `D_Value(3)=1` → step 4 (STG1) / `D_Value(4)=1` → step 8 (STG2) |
| 4 | STG1_INIT | Initialize timers, arrays for STG1 | Auto → step 5 |
| 5 | STG1_MEASURE | Sample Load1L/R into arrays, plot graph | `D_Value(3) = 0` → step 6 |
| 6 | STG1_CALC | Calculate max/avg, judge OK/NG, DO_ON(4) | Auto → step 11 |
| 7 | STG2_TRIGGER | Wait for STG2 start | `D_Value(4)=1` → step 8 |
| 8 | STG2_INIT | Initialize timers, arrays for STG2 | Auto → step 9 |
| 9 | STG2_MEASURE | Sample Load2L/R into arrays, plot graph | `D_Value(4) = 0` → step 10 |
| 10 | STG2_CALC | Calculate max/avg, judge OK/NG, DO_ON(5) | Auto → step 11 |
| 11 | DB_PRINT | UpdateDB + BarcodePrint if OK | Auto → step 11.1 |
| 11.1 | BARCODE_VERIFY | Wait for final barcode scan verification | `srcBarCheckLH="OK" AND srcBarCheckRH="OK"` → DO_ON(6) → step 12 |
| 12 | COMPLETE_WAIT | Wait for unload signal | `D_Value(2) = 1` → clear all DOs → step 100 |
| 100 | FINISH | Clear, show result | Auto → step 0 |
| rStep=1 | EMERGENCY_RESET | `D_Value(1)=1` at any step | Clear all DOs, InitControl → wStep=100 |

---

## 6. Data Flow

```
[Barcode Scanner Serial]
  --> ReadLine() in DataReceived
  --> ScanData = Mid(Incoming, 1, Len-1)
  --> Validate length (14 or 26 chars)
  --> LoadPArt(partNo) → SQL Server TablePart
  --> Set OptionPosition (LH/RH), OptionRemote
  --> DO_ON/OFF(0,1,3) for position/remote indicators

[Torque Tool Serial (binary)]
  --> ReadByte() in background thread
  --> Accumulate 132 bytes
  --> bytes[27:28] hex → Dec2Hex/Hex2Dec → / 1000 (or /100) = Nm value
  --> bytes[5] = "01" = valid tightening complete
  --> Compare vs Basic_TQ_MIN ~ Basic_TQ_MAX
  --> Display OK (Blue) / NG (Red), play sound

[Module I/O Serial]
  --> ReadLine() in background thread
  --> Frame: "S" + 32 bits + "E" (34 chars)
  --> Parse bits 0..15 → D_Value array
  --> Timer1 (100ms) → update IN_LABEL colors
  --> wStep state machine in Tmr_Work1 (100ms) reads D_Value

[Load Cell Serial x4 (END TEST)]
  --> ReadLine() in DataReceived
  --> Strip trailing char
  --> Mid(data, 10, 8) = weight value string → CDbl()
  --> Stored in ValueLoad1L/R, ValueLoad2L/R
  --> wStep 5/9: append to array + graph (HiResTimer timestamp)
  --> wStep 6/10: calculate AVR/MAX, compare spec, judge OK/NG

[SQL Server INSERT/UPDATE]
  --> JA01: INSERT INTO TABLEMAINRH (JA01_DATE, JA01_START_TIME, JA01_END_TIME, LINESERIAL, PARTNO, JA01_TQ1, JA01_TQ2, JA01_DECISION)
  --> JA02: UPDATE TableMainRH SET JA02_DATE, JA02_TQ1, JA02_TQ2, JA02_DECISION WHERE LineSerial
  --> END(JA04): UPDATE TableMainLH/RH SET JA04_STG1_Max, JA04_STG1_AVR, JA04_STG1_DECISION, JA04_STG2_Max, JA04_STG2_AVR, JA04_STG2_DECISION

[ZPL Printer Serial]
  --> Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
  --> ^BXN DataMatrix barcode field (SerialNumber)
  --> ^A0N text fields (PartNo, SerialNumber, PartName)
  --> Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")
```

---

## 7. DB Tables

### 7-1. Local MDB (DB.mdb — per project)

| Table | Columns | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `Table_SerialPort` | MODULE, SCANNER, PRINTER, TOOL1, TOOL2, LASER1, LASER2, PASSWORD | Serial port assignments and password |
| `Table_BASIC` | TOOL1_MIN, TOOL1_MAX, TOOL1_UNIT, TOOL2_MIN, TOOL2_MAX, TOOL2_UNIT | Torque spec limits (JA01~JA03) |
| `Table_BASIC` (END) | Unit, Load1MinL, Load1MaxL, Load1TolL, Load2MinL, Load2MaxL, Load2TolL, Load1MinR, Load1MaxR, Load1TolR, Load2MinR, Load2MaxR, Load2TolR, IgnoreStart, IgnoreEnd, MeasureTypeL, MeasureTypeR | Load cell spec limits and measurement type |
| `Table_Image` | ID, StandardFile | Work instruction image file paths |
| `Table_Barcode` | B1X, B1Y, B1L, B2X..B6W, B6H | Barcode label print position settings |
| `Table_Etc` | LINE_POSITION (unused) | Miscellaneous settings |

### 7-2. SQL Server (NX4C database)

| Table | Key Columns | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `TablePart` | PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote | Part master — LH/RH designation, Remote option |
| `TableMainRH` | JA01_DATE, JA01_START_TIME, JA01_END_TIME, LINESERIAL, PARTNO, JA01_TQ1, JA01_TQ2, JA01_DECISION, JA02_DATE, JA02_TQ1, JA02_TQ2, JA02_DECISION, JA03_*, JA04_STG1_Max, JA04_STG1_AVR, JA04_STG1_DECISION, JA04_STG2_* | RH side process results — one row per unit, updated station by station |
| `TableMainLH` | Same column pattern as TableMainRH | LH side process results |

---

## 8. FlexCell References

| Project | Reference | Version | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| All JA stations | `FlexCell.dll` | 4.3.7.0 | `FlexCell.Grid` in FrmMain (I/O monitor grid), FrmWorkStandardSet (image list grid) |
| SERVER SEARCH | `FlexCell.dll` (via `Grid1`) | 4.3.7.0 | Main data search result grid (`SetDataBinding`, `ExportToExcel`) |
| DLL Path | `C:\Program Files (x86)\FlexCell Technologies\FlexCell.NET4\bin\FlexCell.dll` | — | Installed component |

**FlexCell usage patterns:**

- `Init_Grid(GridName As FlexCell.Grid)` — initialize with 4 columns (No., I/O, Dec.) for I/O monitor display
- `SetDataBinding(dataset, tableName)` — SERVER SEARCH result binding
- `Grid1.ExportToExcel(path, True)` — export to .xls
- `FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter`, `ResizeEnum.Columns`, `SelectionModeEnum.ByCell`

---

## 9. Additional COM References

| Component | Usage | Project |
|---|---|---|
| `ACTETHERLib` / `AxACTETHERLib` | Ethernet I/O controller (ACTOOL Ether) — IN_LABEL/OUT_LABEL typed as `AxCWUIControlsLib.AxCWButton` | END TEST (210) |
| `AxCWUIControlsLib` | CW UI button controls for I/O display | END TEST (210) |
| `ADODB` (7.0.3300.0) | ADO recordset for MDB and SQL Server access | All projects |

> **Note:** JA01~JA03, LH_JA01~LH_JA02 use standard `Label` controls for I/O display. END TEST uses `AxCWButton` controls from the ACTOOL Ether COM component, indicating a different hardware I/O module for that station.

---

## 10. Hardcoded Constants

| Name / Location | Value | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| SQL Server connection string (all `MDBOperation.vb`) | `Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,` | Central SQL Server access |
| Common MDB path (`MDBOperation.vb`) | `..\..\ Common\CommonDB.mdb` | Shared config database path |
| Module serial baudrate | `115200` | I/O module serial port speed |
| Scanner/Printer/Tool baudrate | `9600` | Peripheral device serial port speed |
| Load cell baudrate (END TEST) | `14400` | Load cell serial port speed |
| Tool frame length | `132` | Bytes per torque tool result packet |
| Tool value offset | bytes[27:28] / 1000 (TOOL1), / 100 (TOOL2) | Torque value extraction and scaling |
| Load cell data offset | `Mid(data, 10, 8)` | Extract 8-char numeric field from load cell string |
| Load cell reset command | `0x01 0x5A 0x0D 0x0A` | Tare/zero command |
| IO frame SOF/EOF | `"S"` / `"E"` | Module I/O frame delimiters |
| IO frame length | `34` | Expected receive frame length |
| DO string initial value | `"S" & "00000000" & "E"` | All outputs off initial state |
| Scanner valid length JA01 | `14` | Expected barcode scan length for part number |
| Scanner valid length JA02+ | `26` | Full line serial scan length |
| Timer interval | `100` ms | I/O poll timer and work state timer interval |
| Torque tool valid status byte | `"01"` at index 5 | Indicates completed valid tightening |
| Array max size (END TEST) | `100000` | Maximum load cell sample buffer size |
| osk path | `C:\Windows\System32\osk.exe` | On-screen keyboard launcher |

---

## 11. Shared Code Between Projects

| Shared Element | Projects | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `Common/MDBOperation.vb` | All JA stations | Identical file copied per project (not a shared project reference) |
| `FrmMain.vb` structure | RH_JA01, RH_JA02, LH_JA01, LH_JA02 | Near-identical — JA02 adds 2nd tool thread, JA02 uses 26-char serial input |
| `Module1.vb` globals pattern | All JA stations | Same structure, JA03 adds TOOL2 spec fields, END TEST has load cell fields |
| `Init_Grid()` method | All JA stations | Identical FlexCell grid initialization |
| `Control2Arry()` method | All JA stations | Identical IN_LABEL/OUT_LABEL array mapping |
| `DO_ON/DO_OFF/DO_WRITE()` | All JA stations | Identical bit-string manipulation for module output |
| `ThreadTask2()` I/O module reader | All JA stations | Identical 34-byte frame parser |
| `BarcodePrint()` ZPL method | JA01, JA02, END TEST | Same ZPL template structure |
| SQL Server connection string | All projects | Hardcoded identically in every `MDBOperation.vb` |
| `wStep` flow skeleton (0→1→2→3→4→4.1→5→6→7) | JA01~JA03, LH_JA01~LH_JA02 | Same sequence, END TEST has extended steps 8~12 |

    End Sub

    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)

        Dim i As Integer
        With GridName

            'GridName.Visible = False
            .AutoRedraw = False
            .AllowUserPaste = FlexCell.ClipboardDataEnum.Text
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.Columns
            .AllowUserSort = True
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .ExtendLastCol = True
            .SelectionMode = FlexCell.SelectionModeEnum.ByCell
            .SortIndicatorColor = Color.White
            .BoldFixedCell = False
            '.AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .Cols = 4

            .Column(0).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(3).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 60
            .Column(2).Width = 80
            .Column(3).Width = 100

            .Rows = 1
            .DefaultRowHeight = 0

            For i = 0 To .Rows - 1
                .Cell(i, 0).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 1).Text = "No."
                .Cell(i, 2).Text = "I/O"
                .Cell(i, 3).Text = "Dec."
            Next

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class Frm_Main

    '******************************************************************************
    '변수
    '******************************************************************************
    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet
    '******************************************************************************
    '초기화    
    '******************************************************************************
    Public Sub New()

        InitializeComponent()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("LH")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("RH")

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        GetDataSet()

        'grid3.NullText = ""
        'grid3.AllowUserSort = True
        'grid3.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell.SortIndicatorStyleEnum.Light3D

        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
        'grid3.ExtendLastCol = True
        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "TableMain" & ComboBox1.Text)

        'grid3.Row(0).Height = 0
        'grid3.Column(1).Locked = True
        'grid3.Column(2).Locked = True

        'For i As Integer = 1 To 17
        '    Grid1.Column(i).Locked = True
        '    Grid1.Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.LeftCenter
        'Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM TableMain" & ComboBox1.Text & " WHERE (JA01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                 "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM TableMain" & ComboBox1.Text & " WHERE (JA01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                 "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINESERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"


        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "TableMain" & ComboBox1.Text)
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & ComboBox1.Text
        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then
            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        End If

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click

        If ComboBox1.Text <> "" Then
            SetDataBinding()
        Else
            MsgBox("Check LH / RH")

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System.Data.OleDb

Public Class frmworkstandardset

    Public Click_Index As Integer
    Public Click_Index2 As Integer
    Public Condition_Select As Integer

    Private Sub Grid_Init()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 1
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(0).Width = 10
            .Column(1).Width = 30
            .Column(2).Width = 500

            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "ImageFIle"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With


    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Grid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Grid_Init()

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Image", Mdb_Connect)

        With Grid1

            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then

                'MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")

            ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)

            Else

                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop

            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

        End With

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_Grid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Image", Mdb_Connect)

        With Grid1

            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then

                'MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")

            ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 2).Text
                Rs.Update()

            Else

                Rs.MoveFirst()
                i = 1

                Do Until Rs.EOF

                    Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text
                    i = i + 1
                    Rs.Update()
                    Rs.MoveNext()

                Loop

            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

        End With

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Grid1_MouseClick1(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs) Handles Grid1.MouseClick

        Dim tmp As String

        Click_Index = Grid1.Selection.FirstRow
        tmp = Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text

        Dim Open As New OpenFileDialog()

        Open.ShowDialog()

        If Open.FileName = "" Then
            Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text = tmp
        Else
            Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text = Open.FileName
        End If

        'MsgBox(Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Add_GRid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Image", Mdb_Connect)

        With Grid1

            Rs.AddNew()
            Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = "Null"
            Rs.Update()

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

        End With

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub
    Private Sub Delete_GRid(ByVal ID As String)

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Image WHERE ID = " & ID, Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Rs.Delete()
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub frmworkstandardset_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Me.Load
        Load_Grid()
    End Sub

    Private Sub CN7_btn_Save_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles CN7_btn_Save.Click
        Save_Grid()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        Add_GRid()
        Load_Grid()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click

        If Click_Index <> 0 Then
            Delete_GRid(Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 1).Text)
            Load_Grid()
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Grid1_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Grid1.Load

    End Sub
End Class

Imports System.Data.OleDb

Public Class FrmPart

    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet

    Public Sub New()

        ' 디자이너에서 이 호출이 필요합니다.
        InitializeComponent()

        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하세요.

        SetDataBinding()

        txtTQMAX.Text = Basic_TQ_MAX
        txtTQMIN.Text = Basic_TQ_MIN
        txtTQUNIT.Text = Basic_TQ_UNIT

    End Sub

    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        Dim i As Integer
        GetDataSet()

        'grid3.NullText = ""
        'grid3.AllowUserSort = True
        'grid3.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell.SortIndicatorStyleEnum.Light3D

        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
        'Grid2.ExtendLastCol = True
        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "TablePART")

        Grid1.Column(0).Width = 10
        Grid1.Column(1).Width = 0
        Grid1.Column(2).Width = 110
        Grid1.Column(3).Width = 200
        Grid1.Column(4).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(5).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(6).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(7).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(8).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(9).Width = 80


        'Grid1.Cell(0, 1).Text = "ID"
        'Grid1.Cell(0, 2).Text = "PartNo."
        'Grid1.Cell(0, 3).Text = "PartName"
        'Grid1.Cell(0, 4).Text = "LR"
        'Grid1.Cell(0, 5).Text = "Opt1"
        'Grid1.Cell(0, 6).Text = "Opt2"
        'Grid1.Cell(0, 7).Text = "Opt3"
        'Grid1.Cell(0, 8).Text = "Opt4"
        'Grid1.Cell(0, 9).Text = "Motor Barocde"

        'Grid1.Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        'Grid1.Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        'Grid1.Column(3).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        'Grid1.Column(4).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        'Grid1.Column(5).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        'Grid1.Column(6).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        'Grid1.Column(7).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        'Grid1.Column(8).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        'Grid1.Column(9).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

        'Grid1.Column(4).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
        'Grid1.Column(5).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
        'Grid1.Column(6).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
        'Grid1.Column(7).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
        Grid1.Column(8).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.CheckBox
        Grid1.Column(9).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.CheckBox

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection

        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM TablePART ORDER BY LEN(PARTNO),PARTNO"
        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet

        myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "TablePART")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_Grid()

        Dim intTopRow, intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol As Integer
        Dim myCommandBuilder As System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder

        'End the current edit operation
        Grid1.EndCurrentEdit()

        'Command
        myCommandBuilder = New System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder(myDataAdapter)
        myDataAdapter.DeleteCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetDeleteCommand()
        myDataAdapter.UpdateCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetUpdateCommand()
        myDataAdapter.InsertCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetInsertCommand()

        Try
            'Save to database
            myDataAdapter.Update(myDataSet.Tables("TablePart"))
        Catch ex As Exception
            myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
            Return
        End Try

        myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
        myDataSet.Dispose()
        myDataAdapter.Dispose()

        'Grid status
        intTopRow = Grid1.TopRow
        intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row
        intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col

        'Re-bind
        Grid1.AutoRedraw = False
        SetDataBinding()
        Grid1.Cell(intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol).SetFocus()
        Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow
        Grid1.AutoRedraw = True
        Grid1.Refresh()

        MsgBox("Save Complete.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        Me.Close()
        Timer1.Stop()
    End Sub

    Sub Part_Print(ByVal str1 As String, ByVal str2 As String)

        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "60" & "," & "60" & "^BY5^BXN," & "7" & "," & "200" & ",,,,^FH^FD" & str1 & "^FS")
        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "220" & "," & "60" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str1 & "^FS")
        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "220" & "," & "150" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str2 & "^FS")
        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button3_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePArt ORDER BY LEN(PARTNO),PARTNO", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then

            Rs.MoveFirst()
            i = 1
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Part_Print(Rs.Fields("PARTNO").Value, Rs.Fields("PARTNO").Value)
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        Save_Grid()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button6_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs)

        Basic_TQ_MAX = CDbl(txtTQMAX.Text)
        Basic_TQ_MIN = CDbl(txtTQMIN.Text)
        Basic_TQ_UNIT = CStr(txtTQUNIT.Text)

        Save_BASIC_Data()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click

        Basic_TQ_MAX = CStr(txtTQMAX.Text)
        Basic_TQ_MIN = CStr(txtTQMIN.Text)
        Basic_TQ_UNIT = CStr(txtTQUnit.Text)

        FrmMain.srcTQ_SPEC.Text = Basic_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & Basic_TQ_MAX & " " & Basic_TQ_UNIT

        Save_BASIC_Data()

    End Sub

End Class

분석 완료했습니다. 전체 현황을 정리하겠습니다.

---

## 전체 분석 요약

### 프로젝트 구조

| 영역 | 프로젝트 | 수 |
|---|---|---|
| **FRT** | JA01, JA02, JA03, JA04, SERVER SEARCH | 5개 |
| **REAR** | RH_JA01, RH_JA02, RH_JA03, LH_JA01, LH_JA02, END TEST, SERVER SEARCH | 7개 |
| **REAR 내 FRT 복사** | JA02, JA03, JA04 | 3개 |
| **REAR 추가** | KU VIP 2ND BACK, KU VIP 2ND BACK JA01 | 2개 |
| **합계** | | **17개** |

### FlexCell 사용 패턴 (4가지)

| 패턴 | 폼 | FlexCell API | DataGridView 대체 방식 |
|---|---|---|---|
| **1. I/O 모니터** | FrmMain | `Init_Grid()` — 4열 수동 셀, `.Cell(r,c).Text` | 수동 Columns + `Rows.Add()` |
| **2. DB 바인딩** | FrmPart, FrmSearch, SERVER SEARCH | `.SetDataBinding(ds, table)`, `.Column().Width`, CheckBox열 | `.DataSource = ds.Tables()` |
| **3. 이미지 목록** | FrmWorkStandardSet | `.AddItem()`, `.Cell()`, `.Selection.FirstRow` | 수동 Row 추가, `CurrentRow` |
| **4. Excel 내보내기** | SERVER SEARCH | `.ExportToExcel()` | 수동 CSV/Excel 내보내기 구현 |

### 교체 대상 파일 (프로젝트당)

- `.vbproj` — FlexCell DLL 참조 제거
- `FrmMain.vb` + `FrmMain.Designer.vb` — I/O 그리드
- `FrmPart.vb` + `FrmPart.Designer.vb` — 파트 마스터 그리드
- `FrmWorkStandardSet.vb` + `FrmWorkStandardSet.Designer.vb` — 이미지 설정 그리드
- `FrmSearch.Designer.vb` — 검색 그리드
- `FrmAngleSet.vb/Designer.vb` — JA03만 해당

### 작업 방식 제안

프로젝트 구조가 거의 동일하므로:
1. **RH_JA01** 을 먼저 완전히 교체 (기준 템플릿)
2. 나머지 프로젝트에 동일 패턴 적용 (서브에이전트 병렬 실행)

이 접근으로 진행할까요? 아니면 특정 프로젝트부터 시작하시겠습니까?

file.content:
Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class Frmsearch

    '******************************************************************************
    '변수
    '******************************************************************************
    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    '******************************************************************************
    '초기화    
    '******************************************************************************

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        GetDataSet()

        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection

        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (WORK_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        Dim Qurry2 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (WORK_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND (SERIAL_NUMBER LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")

        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

        End If

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

6. END TEST\ (vbproj: END(210).vbproj)
7. SERVER SEARCH\ (vbproj: SERVEr Search.vbproj)
8. KU VIP 2ND BACK\ (vbproj: KU VIP 2ND BACK.vbproj)

Also these FRT projects stored under REAR:

12. JA04\ (vbproj: FRT JA04.vbproj)

## What to change in EACH project:

### 1. .vbproj file
Remove the FlexCell reference block (3 lines):
```xml

      <SpecificVersion>False</SpecificVersion>
      <HintPath>C:\Program Files (x86)\FlexCell Technologies\FlexCell.NET4\bin\FlexCell.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
```

### 2. FrmMain.Designer.vb — I/O Monitor Grid
Replace FlexCell.Grid declaration and initialization with DataGridView.

**Declaration line** (at bottom of file):
Change: `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid`
To: `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`

**Constructor line**:
Change: `Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()`
To: `Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`

**Properties section** — replace the entire Grid1 property block. The FlexCell block looks like:
```vb
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = FlexCell.BorderStyleEnum.None
Me.Grid1.CheckedImage = Nothing
Me.Grid1.DefaultFont = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 26.0!)
Me.Grid1.DefaultRowHeight = CType(45, Short)
Me.Grid1.Dock = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill
Me.Grid1.Font = ...
Me.Grid1.GridColor = ...
Me.Grid1.Location = ...
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"

Me.Grid1.Size = ...
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = ...
Me.Grid1.UncheckedImage = Nothing
```

Replace with (keep the original Location, Size, TabIndex, Dock values):
```vb
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = False
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToResizeRows = False
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.None
Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 26.0!)
Me.Grid1.Dock = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill  (or keep original Dock)
Me.Grid1.Location = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.ReadOnly = True
Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 45
Me.Grid1.ScrollBars = System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.None
Me.Grid1.Size = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = (keep original)
```

### 3. FrmMain.vb — Init_Grid method
Replace the FlexCell Init_Grid method:
```vb
    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)
        ...
    End Sub
```
With:
```vb
    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As DataGridView)

        With GridName
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "No.")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "I/O")
            .Columns.Add("Col3", "Dec.")

            .Columns(0).Width = 0
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 60
            .Columns(2).Width = 80
            .Columns(3).Width = 100

            For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In .Columns
                col.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.HeaderCell.Style.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.SortMode = DataGridViewColumnSortMode.NotSortable
            Next

        End With

    End Sub
```

### 4. FrmPart.Designer.vb — Part Master Grid (data-bound)
Same pattern as FrmMain.Designer.vb:
- Change declaration: `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid` → `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`
- Change constructor: `Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()` → `Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`
- Replace FlexCell properties with DataGridView equivalent (keep Location, Size, TabIndex):
```vb
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = True

Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle

```

### 5. FrmPart.vb — Part Master Code
Replace FlexCell API calls with DataGridView equivalents:

In `SetDataBinding()`:
```vb
' OLD:

Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False

Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "TablePART")

Remove the commented FlexCell lines too.

In `Save_Grid()`:
```vb
' OLD:

...

intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row
intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col

```vb

...

    intCurrentRow = Grid1.CurrentCell.RowIndex
    intCurrentCol = Grid1.CurrentCell.ColumnIndex
End If
...
SetDataBinding()

    Grid1.CurrentCell = Grid1(intCurrentCol, intCurrentRow)
End If

    Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = intTopRow

### 6. FrmSearch.Designer.vb — Search Grid (data-bound)
Same pattern as FrmPart.Designer.vb for Grid1 declaration, constructor, properties.
Keep Location, Size, TabIndex values. Use AllowUserToAddRows = False, ReadOnly = True.

### 7. FrmSearch.vb — Search Code
Replace:
```vb
Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
```
With:
```vb
Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Main")
```

Replace `Grid1.ExportToExcel(...)` with a manual CSV/DataGridView export:
```vb
    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim filePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".csv"

        Try
            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel") Then
                System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel")
            End If

            Using sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                ' Header
                Dim headers As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In Grid1.Columns
                    If headers.Length > 0 Then headers.Append(",")
                    headers.Append("""" & col.HeaderText.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                Next
                sw.WriteLine(headers.ToString())

                ' Rows
                For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                    Dim line As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                    For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                        If line.Length > 0 Then line.Append(",")
                        Dim val As String = If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), "")
                        line.Append("""" & val.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                    Next
                    sw.WriteLine(line.ToString())
                Next
            End Using

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Critical)
        End Try

    End Sub
```

### 8. FrmWorkStandardSet.Designer.vb — Image List Grid
Same pattern for declaration, constructor:
- `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid` → `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`
- `Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()` → `Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`
- Replace FlexCell props with:
```vb
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = False

Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 12.0!)
Me.Grid1.Location = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Margin = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 20
Me.Grid1.ScrollBars = System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.Vertical
Me.Grid1.Size = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = (keep original)
```

### 9. FrmWorkStandardSet.vb — Image List Code
Replace all FlexCell API calls:

```vb
' Grid_Init — replace:
    Private Sub Grid_Init()
        With Grid1
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "ImageFile")

            .Columns(0).Width = 10
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 30
            .Columns(2).Width = 500

            .AllowUserToAddRows = False
        End With
    End Sub

' Load_Grid — replace .AddItem with DataGridView row add:
' OLD: .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
' NEW: .Rows.Add(Nothing, Rs.Fields("ID").Value, Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)

' Save_Grid — replace Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text with:
' Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(2).Value?.ToString()
' And adjust i to be 0-based (DataGridView rows are 0-based, FlexCell had 1-based with header at 0)

' Grid1_MouseClick1 — replace:
' Grid1.Selection.FirstRow → Grid1.CurrentRow.Index
' Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text → Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value?.ToString()
' Setting: Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = Open.FileName

' Delete_GRid call:
' Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 1).Text → Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value?.ToString()

' Remove Grid1_Load handler (empty, and DataGridView has no Load event)
```

IMPORTANT: When replacing FrmWorkStandardSet.vb, note that FlexCell was 1-based for data rows (row 0 was header). DataGridView rows are 0-based (headers are separate). So in Save_Grid, the loop counter starting at `i = 1` should change to `i = 0`. And in Load_Grid, remove the With Grid1 ... End With wrapping since we just call Grid1.Rows.Add.

### 10. FrmAngleSet (JA03 only)
Check if FrmAngleSet.vb and FrmAngleSet.Designer.vb exist in any REAR project and apply similar replacement.

### 11. FrmToolSet (KU VIP 2ND BACK JA01 only)

## Additional notes for specific projects:
- SERVER SEARCH FrmMain.vb uses `Grid1.SetDataBinding` and `Grid1.ExportToExcel` — replace with `Grid1.DataSource` and CSV export
- SERVER SEARCH FrmMain.Designer.vb — same pattern replacement

- Always read the file first before making edits!

## CRITICAL RULES:

```vb
    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As DataGridView)

        With GridName
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "No.")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "I/O")
            .Columns.Add("Col3", "Dec.")

            .Columns(0).Width = 0
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 60
            .Columns(2).Width = 80
            .Columns(3).Width = 100

            For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In .Columns
                col.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.HeaderCell.Style.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.SortMode = DataGridViewColumnSortMode.NotSortable
            Next

        End With

    End Sub
```

### 7. FrmSearch.vb — Search Code
Replace:

```

Replace `Grid1.ExportToExcel(...)` with a manual CSV/DataGridView export:
```vb
    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim filePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".csv"

        Try
            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel") Then
                System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel")
            End If

            Using sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                ' Header
                Dim headers As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In Grid1.Columns
                    If headers.Length > 0 Then headers.Append(",")
                    headers.Append("""" & col.HeaderText.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                Next
                sw.WriteLine(headers.ToString())

                ' Rows
                For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                    Dim line As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                    For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                        If line.Length > 0 Then line.Append(",")
                        Dim val As String = If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), "")
                        line.Append("""" & val.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                    Next
                    sw.WriteLine(line.ToString())
                Next
            End Using

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Critical)
        End Try

    End Sub
```

```vb
' Grid_Init — replace:

            .Columns(0).Width = 10

            .Columns(1).Width = 30

            .AllowUserToAddRows = False
        End With
    End Sub

' Load_Grid — replace .AddItem with DataGridView row add:
' OLD: .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
' NEW: .Rows.Add(Nothing, Rs.Fields("ID").Value, Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)

' Save_Grid — replace Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text with:
' Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(2).Value?.ToString()
' And adjust i to be 0-based (DataGridView rows are 0-based, FlexCell had 1-based with header at 0)

' Grid1_MouseClick1 — replace:
' Grid1.Selection.FirstRow → Grid1.CurrentRow.Index
' Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text → Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value?.ToString()
' Setting: Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = Open.FileName

' Delete_GRid call:

' Remove Grid1_Load handler (empty, and DataGridView has no Load event)

IMPORTANT: When replacing FrmWorkStandardSet.vb, note that FlexCell was 1-based for data rows (row 0 was header). DataGridView rows are 0-based (headers are separate).                 For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows

### 3. FrmMain.vb — Init_Grid method

Replace with:
```vb
    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As DataGridView)

        With GridName
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "No.")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "I/O")

                col.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter

Replace `Grid1.ExportToExcel(...)` with CSV export:
```vb
    Private Sub ConvertExcel()
        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim filePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".csv"

        Try
            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel") Then
                System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel")
            End If

            Using sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                Dim headers As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In Grid1.Columns
                    If headers.Length > 0 Then headers.Append(",")
                    headers.Append("""" & col.HeaderText.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                Next
                sw.WriteLine(headers.ToString())

                For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                    Dim line As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                    For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                        If line.Length > 0 Then line.Append(",")
                        Dim val As String = If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), "")
                        line.Append("""" & val.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                    Next
                    sw.WriteLine(line.ToString())
                Next
            End Using

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Critical)
        End Try
    End Sub
```

수정 요청사항 정리:

---

## 수정 요청 요약

### OE 차종 (2건)
| # | 요청 | 영향 범위 |
|---|------|----------|
| 1 | **바코드 출력 문제** — 품번/품명은 변경됐으나 차종이 OE차종으로 출력됨 | FRT JA01~JA04 바코드 프린트 로직 (ZPL 출력부) |
| 2 | **F/B JA2 SAB/CSAB 조립 삭제** — OE 차종에서 SAB, CSAB 조립 단계 제거 | FRT JA02 상태머신 (SAB/CSAB step 제거 또는 품번 조건 분기) |

### NX4C 차종 (3건)
| # | 요청 | 영향 범위 |
|---|------|----------|
| 1 | **F/B JA2 럼버서포트 작동불가** — 4개 품번 대상 | FRT JA02 럼버서포트 모터 제어 로직 (품번 매핑 테이블) |
| 2 | **R/B JA2 리트렉트 바코드 식별 추가** — 안전대 품번별 식별코드(702636/705354) | REAR JA02 스캐너 처리 로직에 식별 바코드 검증 추가 |
| 3 | **R/B JA3 댐퍼 2개 품번 조립 삭제** | REAR JA03 상태머신에서 댐퍼 step 제거/skip |

### 부품 매핑 데이터
- OE F/B 13개 품번에 대한 JA01~JA03 공정별 부품 매핑표 포함
- NX4C R/B 4개 품번에 대한 안전대 식별코드 매핑 포함

**프로젝트별 수정 대상:**
- **JA01**: vbproj + FrmMain(Designer/vb) + FrmPart(Designer/vb) + FrmSearch(Designer/vb) + FrmWorkStandardSet(Designer/vb) = 9 파일
- **JA02**: 위와 동일 + FRT PWR 2.vbproj = 10 파일
- **JA03**: JA01과 동일 + FrmAngleSet(Designer/vb) = 12 파일

**주요 치환 내용:**
1. vbproj에서 FlexCell 참조 제거
2. Designer.vb에서 FlexCell.Grid 생성/속성/선언을 DataGridView로 교체 (Location, Size, TabIndex 값 보존)
3. FrmMain.vb Init_Grid를 DataGridView 열 설정으로 교체
4. FrmPart.vb에서 SetDataBinding/Save_Grid의 FlexCell API를 DataGridView API로 교체
5. FrmSearch.vb에서 ExportToExcel을 CSV StreamWriter로 교체
6. FrmWorkStandardSet.vb에서 Cell/AddItem/Selection을 Rows/Cells/CurrentRow로 교체 (1-based -> 0-based 인덱스 보정)
7. FrmAngleSet(JA03)도 동일 패턴 적용

실행 승인 시 PowerShell 스크립트를 실행하고, 완료 후 `FlexCell` 잔존 여부를 grep으로 검증합니다.</result>

    95→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
    96→        Dim strReturn As String = ""
    97→        Try
    98→            Dim hexv As String, na As Long
    99→
   100→            hexv = ""
   101→            Do While DecNum > 0
   102→                na = DecNum Mod 16
   103→                Select Case na
   104→                    Case 10
   105→                        hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   106→                    Case 11
   107→                        hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   108→                    Case 12
   109→                        hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   110→                    Case 13
   111→                        hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   112→                    Case 14
   113→                        hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   114→                    Case 15
   115→                        hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   116→                    Case Else
   117→                        hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   118→                End Select
   119→                If DecNum >= 16 Then
   120→                    DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   121→                Else
   122→                    hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   123→                    Exit Do
   124→                End If
   125→            Loop
   126→
   127→            If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   128→                strReturn = Mid(hexv, 2)
   129→            Else
   130→                strReturn = hexv
   131→            End If
   132→        Catch ex As Exception
   133→            'RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
   134→        End Try
   135→        Dec2Hex = strReturn
   136→
   137→    End Function
   138→
   139→End Module
